tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-025 — parsed_filters should preserve original filters when relaxation occurs
tickets.description: In ai_search(), save original parsed_filters before _apply_relaxation; return original in AiSearchResult.parsed_filters so API response reflects user intent, not relaxed state.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec -T backend python3 -c "import app.main; print('OK')"
